title: hieracium bifidum subsp. seniliforme
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. seniliforme, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. seniliforme include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or inflorescence, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of hay fever.
